effect.name: Cross Hatching BW (2:1)
effect.description: BW cross-hatching with 2:1 pixel-art diagonals, denser/thinner vertical & horizontal lines, and protected deep blacks.
effect.author: Selphy Geumja

parameter.name: Line Scale
parameter.description: Line density (acts like pixel grid scale)

parameter.name: Black Threshold
parameter.description: Deep-black cutoff (no hatching under this luminance)
